Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.invitedYou: You have been invited to join this community.

HomePage.title: MahberConnect
HomePage.description: The modern platform for Ethiopian community financial management. Manage your Mahber, Equub, and Iddir with ease.
HomePage.heroDesc: MahberConnect is the modern platform built specifically for Ethiopian community associations — Mahber, Edir, and religious groups — bringing transparent finance, smart membership, and seamless coordination to every member, wherever they are.
HomePage.problemDesc: Globalization and urbanization are eroding the foundations of Mahber and Edir. Without modern tools, these vital cultural institutions risk fading away.
HomePage.prob1Desc: Handwritten notebooks get lost, damaged, or disputed — creating distrust and financial gaps within communities.
HomePage.prob2Desc: Event scheduling, attendance tracking, and member communication rely on phone calls and word of mouth.
HomePage.prob3Desc: Members living abroad have no reliable way to stay engaged, contribute financially, or participate in decisions.
HomePage.featuresDesc: Purpose-built features that respect traditional community structures while bringing them into the digital age.
HomePage.feat1Desc: Role-based access for Admins, Treasurers, Hosts, and Members with custom approval workflows tailored to traditional structures.
HomePage.feat2Desc: Schedule gatherings with automatic mobile reminders and fast QR-based check-ins — no paper lists needed.
HomePage.feat3Desc: Transparent financial recording, automated reporting, and local payment integration via Chapa for dues and contributions.
HomePage.feat4Desc: Full support for both Amharic and English so every generation — from elders to diaspora youth — feels at home.
HomePage.feat5Desc: Every action is tracked and logged, fostering deep trust and accountability within your community.
HomePage.feat6Desc: Manage or participate in multiple associations simultaneously. Built from day one to bridge the gap for members abroad.
HomePage.ctaTitle: Ready to bring your Mahber online?
HomePage.ctaDesc: Join the growing number of Ethiopian community associations modernizing their operations with MahberConnect.
HomePage.footerTagline: A cloud-based digital platform preserving and strengthening Ethiopian community associations through modern technology.
HomePage.footerProjectDesc: Built to serve Mahber, Edir, and religious community associations across Ethiopia and the diaspora.
HomePage.footerBuiltWith: Built with care for Ethiopian communities worldwide.

validation.phoneInvalid: Must be a valid Ethiopian phone number (e.g. +251911234567)
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordComplex: Password must have at least 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number
